title: Dungeons Arise Sparse Structures compat
description: Makes all of Dungeons Arise structures individual structure sets so that sparse structures allows you to config each individual structure instead of minor/major structures.
body:
Allows structures from WDA to be configed individually with sparse structures. 

when you type /dumpstructuresets ingame (via sparse structures) you used to only get major and minor structure sets, however W.D.A. has alot of structures, this compat makes it to where you will set every individual structure with sparse structures. 
![code of the file that the mod manages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a04fe84d32d5049e18c170d77d479cd89fe18ec1.png)
Major structures is bandit village

minor structures is fishing hut

I had to leave these file names the same to override them via datapack.

Grab a wabbanode server to host your own server
https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/booglie 
![wabbanode banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87b19f4b9068d4a344b05dda840b8b088e3be4f7.png)
